name: hoc/page-header
description: A reusable page-header layout HOC that standardizes the top section of application pages with a title, optional subtitle or breadcrumb trail, and action-button slots. Provides PageHeader, PageHeaderTitle, PageHeaderDescription, and PageHeaderAction primitives with responsive flex layouts and consistent typography. Often combined with Breadcrumbs and Button components for admin dashboards and content-management pages.
useCases: Admin list pages with a 'Users' title, breadcrumb (Home / Users), and a 'Create User' button
Settings-category headers displaying the section name, a description, and a save-action button
Content-management edit pages with the article title, publish status, and preview/delete actions
Analytics report pages showing the report name, date-range subtitle, and export/share controls
usage: import { PageHeader, PageHeaderTitle, PageHeaderDescription, PageHeaderAction } from "shadcn-solid-components/hoc/page-header"
